rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT ROLLINGWOOD INVESTMENT & MORTGAGE COMPANY, CLAIRE BARNES MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Moving party to prepare order pursuant to CCP 437 c(g). (REQ/302/PB)
